trade.summary: Thailand exports electronic components, automobiles, food products (rice, seafood), and rubber to the UAE. The UAE exports crude oil, refined petroleum, and gold to Thailand. The UAE is an important transit hub for Thai goods entering the Middle East and Africa.

diplomatic.summary: Relations are friendly with growing commercial and tourism ties. Thailand has a large migrant worker community in the UAE. Thai tourism to UAE has grown. Both countries cooperate in ASEAN-GCC forums. High-level visits are regular.

military.summary: Limited military ties. Some defense industrial contacts. Thailand imports some UAE military technology. No significant joint exercises or arms transfer programs.

financial.summary: UAE sovereign funds have invested in Thai infrastructure and real estate. Thai SET-listed companies have UAE business interests. Remittances from Thai workers in UAE are significant. Dubai is an important financial gateway for Thai businesses entering Middle East.

energy.summary: Thailand imports UAE crude oil and refined petroleum. PTTEP (Thailand's state oil company) has exploration interests in the Gulf. Thailand's energy import dependence makes UAE supply relationships strategically important.

scientific.summary: Scientific collaboration is modest. Thailand and UAE cooperate in food technology, agricultural science, and some medical research. Tourism and hospitality management education links are growing.
